name: Spicy Sausage and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fully cooked Polish sausage, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
2 tsp Chili powder or adjust to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the sausage, seasonings, and tomatoes.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Stir in the macaroni.
4. Reduce heat to medium.
5. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until the macaroni is tender.
6. Stir in the beans; cook for an additional 1 minute or until thoroughly heated.
7. Makes 4 (1 1/4 cup) servings.
